strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded systems)
Proven entrepreneurial experience with GISCollective (open-source geo-data platform) and AI-agent infrastructure contributions at re:cinq
Strong technical leadership in AI/ML-adjacent tooling (MCP, developer frameworks) and cloud-native systems (Kubernetes, AWS CDK)
concerns: No explicit AI-focused education (Master's/PhD in AI-related field) despite extensive software engineering background
Limited direct experience with building AI-powered products/platforms (resume highlights general software development and geo-data systems)
Short tenure at current role (re:cinq, April 2025–Present) lacks long-term strategic impact validation
response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong software engineering depth and breadth, including recent AI-agent infrastructure work, but lacks explicit AI-focused education or clear track record of building AI-powered products. His entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) and technical leadership are assets, but the role requires deeper AI specialization and strategic cloud product experience. The short tenure at re:cinq introduces uncertainty about long-term impact.
